title: Katters Structures - Village
description: Sub-project of "Katters Structures" with only the Villages
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76479a37bd2849a6b4dc998bcfa897c33edb6104.png)
# 📖 Description This is a Sub-project of [Katters Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/katters-structures), only containing the Villages added in Katters Structures # 🛠️ Compatibility Has support for: - [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) - [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
versions - v1.7 : temporary disabled until the datapack gets updated
- v1.8+ : Automaticons can be looted in some structures without the need of no extra version for both the pre 20.5 and 20.5+ version
- [Nice Mobs Remastered](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nice-mobs-remastered) - dedicated spawnpoints for some mobs - [Nice Blockhead Mobs](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nice-blockhead-mobs) - successor to NMR - [Enchantments Encore](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchantments-encore) - compatible Enchantments - [Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions) - showes Enchantment Descriptions - [Enchantment Lore](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-lore) - Open enchanted books like written books to read their description and lore. # 🍦 Vanilla Friendly! Uses only vanilla blocks. No other dependencies needed. # 📚 Content
Structures - Cherry Village - Jungle Village - Swamp Village - Ocean Village - Underground Village - Sky Village - Mesa Village - Birch Village - Trader Outposts
Enchantments - Blunt - increases Damage against Armor - Heavy - increases Damage but lowers Attackspeed and Agility - Light - increases Agility but lowers Defense - Curse of Crystal - Greatly increases Damage at the cost of robustness of the Weapon
added 50+ new Books with interesting Stories from the perspective of the Villagers # 💬 Dialog/ Gamerules From KS version 2.3 and MC version 1.21.6 Katters Structures has the new Dialog function. These allow you: - as Admin/ OP: - To give yourself any special Item in the Pack - Change the Gamerules of KS: - This Includes Disabling all Bosses, - Disabling entrance to the Deep Blue, - Disabling the use of Custom Models, - Disabling Bossbars - as a normal User: - look up a Pack FAQ as Admin: ```/function kattersstructures``` as User: it's found in the pause menu ❗ Disabling Bosses or the Deep Blue will not disable the structures/ dimension itself. It will only disable the spawning of them or the functionality of already spawned ones. Sadly, it's not possible to disable Structures via Code in Datapacks # ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions We're here to help! If you happen to have questions, suggestions or just encountered a bug, then feel free to hop on our discord server to ask for help in our **Data Pack Section**. [Click to join the server](https://discord.gg/f2pMggfgVv) ## 🎮 Explorer's Eden SMP Join **[A Realm Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/server/a-realm-recrafted)**, our Minecraft SMP! Enjoy a world featuring all of our (actively maintained) data packs, as well as some exclusive ones. It’s completely free without any microtransactions. Come build, explore, and craft with us today!
